title: selaginella cavifolia
intro: Selaginella cavifolia is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as a type of spikemoss. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella cavifolia include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and acting as an antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies for its medicinal properties.
